traces.mapping_rationale: Direct bank match for removing the identifier column from both train and test feature matrices.
Direct bank match for removing the deterministic zero-variance official columns before downstream modeling branches.
Direct bank match for label encoding the released object columns X0, X1, X2, X3, X4, X5, X6, and X8 using the combined train/test vocabulary.
Direct bank match for a model-specific RobustScaler branch over the repaired numeric matrix.
Direct bank match for the 12-component PCA branch used in many Mercedes stacked solutions.
Direct bank match for an RFECV-style feature-selection branch over the repaired feature matrix.

omitted_notebook_steps.note: The bank also contains one-hot encoding, SVD, ICA, and min-max scaling alternatives, but this baseline intentionally selects only one row from each equivalence group.
Preparing a submission dataframe with ID and predictions is shown as notebook context but is not mapped to a standalone candidate-bank action.
